title: centaurium erythraea subsp. boissieri
intro: Centaurium erythraea subsp. boissieri is a subspecies of the Centaurium erythraea plant, also known as mountain centaury, a flowering plant species in the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Centaurium erythraea subsp. boissieri include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and other conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
